daily.today_energy: You're giving main character energy today, Taurus. The cosmos is whispering that it's time to trust your gut and lean into what feels authentic. Your vibe is magnetic—lean into it.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, there's a softness in your connections rn. If someone's been on your mind, the universe is nudging you toward honest conversations. No games, just real talk.
daily.career: Your practical energy is *chef's kiss* today. That project you've been overthinking? Time to stop spiraling and actually start building. Your efforts are about to compound in ways you'll notice soon.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding today—think long walks, good food, or literally sitting outside. Moving slowly and mindfully will reset your whole system. You deserve to feel at ease.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about slowing down and savoring the small moments. Mercury's vibes are nudging you to reconnect with what actually matters—your people, your peace, your purpose. Trust the process.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, the stars are whispering about authenticity. Stop performing and start showing up as your real self. Vulnerability isn't weakness; it's literally magnetic right now.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaked this week. That idea you've been sitting on? This is the moment to test it out. The universe is giving you permission to take one small bold move. Your confidence will carry you.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for grounding rituals—think walks, tea, journaling, whatever makes you feel rooted. Energy flows where intention goes. Tune into what your system actually needs instead of what you think it should want.
